   Input: Implement all HTML template files per design_spec.md Section 2
=== design_spec.md ===
# OnlineAuction Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Backend Routes Specification

| Route Path                 | Function Name          | HTTP Method | Template              | Context Variables                                                                                          |
|----------------------------|------------------------|-------------|-----------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                          | root_redirect          | GET         | None (redirect)       | None                                                                                                       |
| /dashboard                 | dashboard              | GET         | dashboard.html        | featured_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}, trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, bid_count: int}, categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, item_count: int} |
| /catalog                   | auction_catalog        | GET         | catalog.html          | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str} , categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str} |
| /auction/<int:auction_id>  | auction_details        | GET         | auction_details.html  | auction: dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, status: str, image_url: str}, bid_history: list of dict {bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str} |
| /place_bid/<int:auction_id>| place_bid              | GET         | place_bid.html        | auction: dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, minimum_bid: float}                                                                              |
| /submit_bid/<int:auction_id>| submit_bid            | POST        | None (redirect)       | Form data (bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float) - No template                                                                                                         |
| /bid_history               | bid_history            | GET         | bid_history.html      | bids: list of dict {bid_id: int, auction_name: str, bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str}, auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str} |
| /categories               | categories             | GET         | categories.html       | categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, description: str, item_count: int}                                                                  |
| /category/<int:category_id>| category_items         | GET         | catalog.html          | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str}, category_name: str          |
| /winners                  | winners                | GET         | winners.html          | winners: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, winner_name: str, winning_bid: float, win_date: str}                                                          |
| /trending                 | trending_auctions      | GET         | trending.html         | trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, bid_count: int, current_bid: float, trending_rank: int}                                           |
| /auction_status           | auction_status         | GET         | auction_status.html   | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, status: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}                                                             |
| /refresh_status           | refresh_status         | POST        | None (redirect)       | No template                                                                                               |

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Template Filename: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Auction Dashboard
- Header Title: Auction Dashboard (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page: Div container for the dashboard page
  - featured-auctions: Div for featured auction items
  - browse-auctions-button: Button to go to auction catalog
  - view-bids-button: Button to go to bid history
  - trending-auctions-button: Button to go to trending auctions
- Navigation:
  - browse-auctions-button: url_for('auction_catalog')
  - view-bids-button: url_for('bid_history')
  - trending-auctions-button: url_for('trending_auctions')
- Context Variables:
  - featured_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}
  - trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, bid_count: int}
  - categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, item_count: int}

### 2. Auction Catalog Page
- Template Filename: templates/catalog.html
- Page Title: Auction Catalog
- Header Title: Auction Catalog (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - catalog-page: Div container
  - search-input: Input text field
  - category-filter: Dropdown select with options Electronics, Collectibles, Furniture, Art, Other
  - auctions-grid: Div grid for auction cards
  - view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}: Button in each auction card
- Navigation:
  - view-auction-button: url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, description, category, current_bid, end_time, image_url}
  - categories: list of dict {category_id, category_name}

### 3. Auction Details Page
- Template Filename: templates/auction_details.html
- Page Title: Auction Details
- Header Title: Auction Details (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - auction-details-page: Div container
  - auction-title: H1 with auction item title
  - auction-description: Div with item description
  - current-bid: Div with current highest bid
  - place-bid-button: Button to place new bid
  - bid-history: Div showing list of bids with bidder name and amount
- Navigation:
  - place-bid-button: url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auction: dict
  - bid_history: list of dict {bidder_name, bid_amount, bid_timestamp}

### 4. Place Bid Page
- Template Filename: templates/place_bid.html
- Page Title: Place Bid
- Header Title: Place Bid (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - place-bid-page: Div container
  - bidder-name: Input field
  - bid-amount: Input field
  - auction-name: Div showing auction item name
  - minimum-bid: Div showing minimum acceptable bid
  - submit-bid-button: Button to submit
- Navigation:
  - Form POST action to url_for('submit_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auction: dict (auction_id, item_name, current_bid, minimum_bid)

### 5. Bid History Page
- Template Filename: templates/bid_history.html
- Page Title: Bid History
- Header Title: Bid History (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - bid-history-page: Div container
  - bids-table: Table with columns bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp
  - filter-by-auction: Dropdown to filter bids by auction
  - sort-by-amount: Button
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - bids: list of dict {bid_id, auction_name, bidder_name, bid_amount, bid_timestamp}
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name}

### 6. Auction Categories Page
- Template Filename: templates/categories.html
- Page Title: Auction Categories
- Header Title: Auction Categories (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - categories-page: Div container
  - categories-list: Div list
  - category-card-{{ category.category_id }}: Div card for each category
  - view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}: Button in each category card
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - view-category-button: url_for('category_items', category_id=category.category_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - categories: list of dict {category_id, category_name, description, item_count}

### 7. Winners Page
- Template Filename: templates/winners.html
- Page Title: Winning Items
- Header Title: Winning Items (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - winners-page: Div container
  - winners-list: Div list
  - winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}: Div card for each winning item
  - filter-by-winner: Input field
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - winners: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, winner_name, winning_bid, win_date}

### 8. Trending Auctions Page
- Template Filename: templates/trending.html
- Page Title: Trending Auctions
- Header Title: Trending Auctions (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - trending-page: Div container
  - trending-list: Div ranked list
  - time-range-filter: Dropdown select (Last 24 Hours, This Week, All Time)
  - view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}: Button per item
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - view-auction-button: url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, bid_count, current_bid, trending_rank}

### 9. Auction Status Page
- Template Filename: templates/auction_status.html
- Page Title: Auction Status
- Header Title: Auction Status (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - status-page: Div container
  - status-filter: Dropdown (All, Active, Closed, Upcoming)
  - status-table: Table with columns name, status, time remaining, current bid
  - refresh-status-button: Button
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - refresh-status-button: POST to url_for('refresh_status')
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, status, current_bid, end_time}

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. Auctions Data
- Path: data/auctions.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. auction_id (int)
  2. item_name (str)
  3. description (str)
  4. category (str)
  5. starting_bid (float)
  6. current_bid (float)
  7. end_time (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
  8. status (str) (e.g., Active, Closed)
  9. image_url (str)
- Description: Stores all auction items with details including bidding status and image
- Example Data Rows:
  1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg
  2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg
  3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg

### 2. Categories Data
- Path: data/categories.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. category_id (int)
  2. category_name (str)
  3. description (str)
  4. item_count (int)
- Description: Stores all auction categories with description and item counts
- Example Data Rows:
  1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15
  2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28
  3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12

### 3. Bids Data
- Path: data/bids.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. bid_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. bidder_name (str)
  4. bid_amount (float)
  5. bid_timestamp (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Description: Stores all bids placed on auctions
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30
  2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45
  3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15

### 4. Winners Data
- Path: data/winners.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. winner_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. item_name (str)
  4. winner_name (str)
  5. winning_bid (float)
  6. win_date (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Stores winning auction items with winner details and winning bid amounts
- Example Data Rows:
  1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08
  2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03
  3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01

### 5. Bid History Data
- Path: data/bid_history.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. history_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. auction_name (str)
  4. bidder_name (str)
  5. bid_amount (float)
  6. bid_timestamp (str, format:YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Description: Stores complete bid history records with auction and bidder info
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00
  2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45
  3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45

### 6. Items Data
- Path: data/items.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. item_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. item_name (str)
  4. starting_price (float)
  5. category (str)
  6. condition (str)
  7. seller_name (str)
- Description: Stores item details for auctions including condition and seller
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector
  2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store
  3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop

### 7. Trending Data
- Path: data/trending.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. auction_id (int)
  2. item_name (str)
  3. bid_count (int)
  4. current_bid (float)
  5. trending_rank (int)
  6. time_period (str)
- Description: Stores ranked trending auction data by bid activity and period
- Example Data Rows:
  2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week
  1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week
  5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week

---

Auctions Data - Path: data/auctions.txt - File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line - Fields:   1. auction_id (int)   2. item_name (str)   3. description (str)   4. category (str)   5. starting_bid (float)   6. current_bid (float)   7. end_time (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)   8. status (str) (e.g., Active, Closed)   9. image_url (str) - Description: Stores all auction items with details including bidding status and image - Example Data Rows:   1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg   2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg   3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg  ### 2. Categories Data - Path: data/categories.txt - File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line - Fields:   1. category_id (int)   2. category_name (str)   3. description (str)   4. item_count (int) - Description: Stores all auction categories with description and item counts - Example Data Rows:   1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15   2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28   3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12  ### 3. Winners Data - Path: data/winners.txt - File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line - Fields:   1. winner_id (int)   2. auction_id (int)   3. item_name (str)   4. winner_name (str)   5. winning_bid (float)   6. win_date (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD) - Description: Stores winning auction items with winner details and winning bid amounts - Example Data Rows:   1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08   2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03   3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01  ### 5. Bid History Data - Path: data/bid_history.txt - File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line - Fields:   1. history_id (int)   2. auction_id (int)   3. auction_name (str)   4. bidder_name (str)   5. bid_amount (float)   6. bid_timestamp (str, format:YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - Description: Stores complete bid history records with auction and bidder info - Example Data Rows:   1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00   2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45   3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45  ### 6. Items Data - Path: data/items.txt - File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line - Fields:   1. item_id (int)   2. auction_id (int)   3. item_name (str)   4. starting_price (float)   5. category (str)   6. condition (str)   7. seller_name (str) - Description: Stores item details for auctions including condition and seller - Example Data Rows:   1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector   2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store   3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop  ### 7. # OnlineAuction Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Backend Routes Specification

| Route Path                 | Function Name          | HTTP Method | Template              | Context Variables                                                                                          |
|----------------------------|------------------------|-------------|-----------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                          | root_redirect          | GET         | None (redirect)       | None                                                                                                       |
| /dashboard                 | dashboard              | GET         | dashboard.html        | featured_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}, trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, bid_count: int}, categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, item_count: int} |
| /catalog                   | auction_catalog        | GET         | catalog.html          | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str} , categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str} |
| /auction/<int:auction_id>  | auction_details        | GET         | auction_details.html  | auction: dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, status: str, image_url: str}, bid_history: list of dict {bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str} |
| /place_bid/<int:auction_id>| place_bid              | GET         | place_bid.html        | auction: dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, minimum_bid: float}                                                                              |
| /submit_bid/<int:auction_id>| submit_bid            | POST        | None (redirect)       | Form data (bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float) - No template                                                                                                         |
| /bid_history               | bid_history            | GET         | bid_history.html      | bids: list of dict {bid_id: int, auction_name: str, bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str}, auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str} |
| /categories               | categories             | GET         | categories.html       | categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, description: str, item_count: int}                                                                  |
| /category/<int:category_id>| category_items         | GET         | catalog.html          | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str}, category_name: str          |
| /winners                  | winners                | GET         | winners.html          | winners: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, winner_name: str, winning_bid: float, win_date: str}                                                          |
| /trending                 | trending_auctions      | GET         | trending.html         | trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, bid_count: int, current_bid: float, trending_rank: int}                                           |
| /auction_status           | auction_status         | GET         | auction_status.html   | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, status: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}                                                             |
| /refresh_status           | refresh_status         | POST        | None (redirect)       | No template                                                                                               |

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Template Filename: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Auction Dashboard
- Header Title: Auction Dashboard (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page: Div container for the dashboard page
  - featured-auctions: Div for featured auction items
  - browse-auctions-button: Button to go to auction catalog
  - view-bids-button: Button to go to bid history
  - trending-auctions-button: Button to go to trending auctions
- Navigation:
  - browse-auctions-button: url_for('auction_catalog')
  - view-bids-button: url_for('bid_history')
  - trending-auctions-button: url_for('trending_auctions')
- Context Variables:
  - featured_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}
  - trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, bid_count: int}
  - categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, item_count: int}

### 2. Auction Catalog Page
- Template Filename: templates/catalog.html
- Page Title: Auction Catalog
- Header Title: Auction Catalog (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - catalog-page: Div container
  - search-input: Input text field
  - category-filter: Dropdown select with options Electronics, Collectibles, Furniture, Art, Other
  - auctions-grid: Div grid for auction cards
  - view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}: Button in each auction card
- Navigation:
  - view-auction-button: url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, description, category, current_bid, end_time, image_url}
  - categories: list of dict {category_id, category_name}

### 3. Auction Details Page
- Template Filename: templates/auction_details.html
- Page Title: Auction Details
- Header Title: Auction Details (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - auction-details-page: Div container
  - auction-title: H1 with auction item title
  - auction-description: Div with item description
  - current-bid: Div with current highest bid
  - place-bid-button: Button to place new bid
  - bid-history: Div showing list of bids with bidder name and amount
- Navigation:
  - place-bid-button: url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auction: dict
  - bid_history: list of dict {bidder_name, bid_amount, bid_timestamp}

### 4. Place Bid Page
- Template Filename: templates/place_bid.html
- Page Title: Place Bid
- Header Title: Place Bid (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - place-bid-page: Div container
  - bidder-name: Input field
  - bid-amount: Input field
  - auction-name: Div showing auction item name
  - minimum-bid: Div showing minimum acceptable bid
  - submit-bid-button: Button to submit
- Navigation:
  - Form POST action to url_for('submit_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auction: dict (auction_id, item_name, current_bid, minimum_bid)

### 5. Bid History Page
- Template Filename: templates/bid_history.html
- Page Title: Bid History
- Header Title: Bid History (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - bid-history-page: Div container
  - bids-table: Table with columns bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp
  - filter-by-auction: Dropdown to filter bids by auction
  - sort-by-amount: Button
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - bids: list of dict {bid_id, auction_name, bidder_name, bid_amount, bid_timestamp}
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name}

### 6. Auction Categories Page
- Template Filename: templates/categories.html
- Page Title: Auction Categories
- Header Title: Auction Categories (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - categories-page: Div container
  - categories-list: Div list
  - category-card-{{ category.category_id }}: Div card for each category
  - view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}: Button in each category card
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - view-category-button: url_for('category_items', category_id=category.category_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - categories: list of dict {category_id, category_name, description, item_count}

### 7. Winners Page
- Template Filename: templates/winners.html
- Page Title: Winning Items
- Header Title: Winning Items (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - winners-page: Div container
  - winners-list: Div list
  - winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}: Div card for each winning item
  - filter-by-winner: Input field
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - winners: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, winner_name, winning_bid, win_date}

### 8. Trending Auctions Page
- Template Filename: templates/trending.html
- Page Title: Trending Auctions
- Header Title: Trending Auctions (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - trending-page: Div container
  - trending-list: Div ranked list
  - time-range-filter: Dropdown select (Last 24 Hours, This Week, All Time)
  - view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}: Button per item
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - view-auction-button: url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, bid_count, current_bid, trending_rank}

### 9. Auction Status Page
- Template Filename: templates/auction_status.html
- Page Title: Auction Status
- Header Title: Auction Status (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - status-page: Div container
  - status-filter: Dropdown (All, Active, Closed, Upcoming)
  - status-table: Table with columns name, status, time remaining, current bid
  - refresh-status-button: Button
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - refresh-status-button: POST to url_for('refresh_status')
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, status, current_bid, end_time}

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. Auctions Data
- Path: data/auctions.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. auction_id (int)
  2. item_name (str)
  3. description (str)
  4. category (str)
  5. starting_bid (float)
  6. current_bid (float)
  7. end_time (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
  8. status (str) (e.g., Active, Closed)
  9. image_url (str)
- Description: Stores all auction items with details including bidding status and image
- Example Data Rows:
  1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg
  2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg
  3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg

### 2. Categories Data
- Path: data/categories.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. category_id (int)
  2. category_name (str)
  3. description (str)
  4. item_count (int)
- Description: Stores all auction categories with description and item counts
- Example Data Rows:
  1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15
  2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28
  3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12

### 3. Bids Data
- Path: data/bids.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. bid_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. bidder_name (str)
  4. bid_amount (float)
  5. bid_timestamp (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Description: Stores all bids placed on auctions
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30
  2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45
  3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15

### 4. Winners Data
- Path: data/winners.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. winner_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. item_name (str)
  4. winner_name (str)
  5. winning_bid (float)
  6. win_date (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Stores winning auction items with winner details and winning bid amounts
- Example Data Rows:
  1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08
  2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03
  3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01

### 5. Bid History Data
- Path: data/bid_history.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. history_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. auction_name (str)
  4. bidder_name (str)
  5. bid_amount (float)
  6. bid_timestamp (str, format:YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Description: Stores complete bid history records with auction and bidder info
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00
  2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45
  3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45

### 6. Items Data
- Path: data/items.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. item_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. item_name (str)
  4. starting_price (float)
  5. category (str)
  6. condition (str)
  7. seller_name (str)
- Description: Stores item details for auctions including condition and seller
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector
  2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store
  3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop

### 7. Trending Data
- Path: data/trending.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. auction_id (int)
  2. item_name (str)
  3. bid_count (int)
  4. current_bid (float)
  5. trending_rank (int)
  6. time_period (str)
- Description: Stores ranked trending auction data by bid activity and period
- Example Data Rows:
  2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week
  1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week
  5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week

=== LLM_call: BackendDeveloper_SelfReflect ===
INPUT: === Original Task ===
Implement app.py with all Flask routes and data management per design_spec.md Sections 1 and 3
=== design_spec.md ===
# OnlineAuction Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Backend Routes Specification

| Route Path                 | Function Name          | HTTP Method | Template              | Context Variables                                                                                          |
|----------------------------|------------------------|-------------|-----------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                          | root_redirect          | GET         | None (redirect)       | None                                                                                                       |
| /dashboard                 | dashboard              | GET         | dashboard.html        | featured_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}, trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, bid_count: int}, categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, item_count: int} |
| /catalog                   | auction_catalog        | GET         | catalog.html          | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str} , categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str} |
| /auction/<int:auction_id>  | auction_details        | GET         | auction_details.html  | auction: dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, status: str, image_url: str}, bid_history: list of dict {bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str} |
| /place_bid/<int:auction_id>| place_bid              | GET         | place_bid.html        | auction: dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, minimum_bid: float}                                                                              |
| /submit_bid/<int:auction_id>| submit_bid            | POST        | None (redirect)       | Form data (bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float) - No template                                                                                                         |
| /bid_history               | bid_history            | GET         | bid_history.html      | bids: list of dict {bid_id: int, auction_name: str, bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str}, auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str} |
| /categories               | categories             | GET         | categories.html       | categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, description: str, item_count: int}                                                                  |
| /category/<int:category_id>| category_items         | GET         | catalog.html          | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str}, category_name: str          |
| /winners                  | winners                | GET         | winners.html          | winners: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, winner_name: str, winning_bid: float, win_date: str}                                                          |
| /trending                 | trending_auctions      | GET         | trending.html         | trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, bid_count: int, current_bid: float, trending_rank: int}                                           |
| /auction_status           | auction_status         | GET         | auction_status.html   | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, status: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}                                                             |
| /refresh_status           | refresh_status         | POST        | None (redirect)       | No template                                                                                               |

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Template Filename: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Auction Dashboard
- Header Title: Auction Dashboard (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page: Div container for the dashboard page
  - featured-auctions: Div for featured auction items
  - browse-auctions-button: Button to go to auction catalog
  - view-bids-button: Button to go to bid history
  - trending-auctions-button: Button to go to trending auctions
- Navigation:
  - browse-auctions-button: url_for('auction_catalog')
  - view-bids-button: url_for('bid_history')
  - trending-auctions-button: url_for('trending_auctions')
- Context Variables:
  - featured_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}
  - trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, bid_count: int}
  - categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, item_count: int}

### 2. Auction Catalog Page
- Template Filename: templates/catalog.html
- Page Title: Auction Catalog
- Header Title: Auction Catalog (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - catalog-page: Div container
  - search-input: Input text field
  - category-filter: Dropdown select with options Electronics, Collectibles, Furniture, Art, Other
  - auctions-grid: Div grid for auction cards
  - view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}: Button in each auction card
- Navigation:
  - view-auction-button: url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, description, category, current_bid, end_time, image_url}
  - categories: list of dict {category_id, category_name}

### 3. Auction Details Page
- Template Filename: templates/auction_details.html
- Page Title: Auction Details
- Header Title: Auction Details (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - auction-details-page: Div container
  - auction-title: H1 with auction item title
  - auction-description: Div with item description
  - current-bid: Div with current highest bid
  - place-bid-button: Button to place new bid
  - bid-history: Div showing list of bids with bidder name and amount
- Navigation:
  - place-bid-button: url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auction: dict
  - bid_history: list of dict {bidder_name, bid_amount, bid_timestamp}

### 4. Place Bid Page
- Template Filename: templates/place_bid.html
- Page Title: Place Bid
- Header Title: Place Bid (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - place-bid-page: Div container
  - bidder-name: Input field
  - bid-amount: Input field
  - auction-name: Div showing auction item name
  - minimum-bid: Div showing minimum acceptable bid
  - submit-bid-button: Button to submit
- Navigation:
  - Form POST action to url_for('submit_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auction: dict (auction_id, item_name, current_bid, minimum_bid)

### 5. Bid History Page
- Template Filename: templates/bid_history.html
- Page Title: Bid History
- Header Title: Bid History (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - bid-history-page: Div container
  - bids-table: Table with columns bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp
  - filter-by-auction: Dropdown to filter bids by auction
  - sort-by-amount: Button
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - bids: list of dict {bid_id, auction_name, bidder_name, bid_amount, bid_timestamp}
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name}

### 6. Auction Categories Page
- Template Filename: templates/categories.html
- Page Title: Auction Categories
- Header Title: Auction Categories (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - categories-page: Div container
  - categories-list: Div list
  - category-card-{{ category.category_id }}: Div card for each category
  - view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}: Button in each category card
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - view-category-button: url_for('category_items', category_id=category.category_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - categories: list of dict {category_id, category_name, description, item_count}

### 7. Winners Page
- Template Filename: templates/winners.html
- Page Title: Winning Items
- Header Title: Winning Items (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - winners-page: Div container
  - winners-list: Div list
  - winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}: Div card for each winning item
  - filter-by-winner: Input field
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - winners: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, winner_name, winning_bid, win_date}

### 8. Trending Auctions Page
- Template Filename: templates/trending.html
- Page Title: Trending Auctions
- Header Title: Trending Auctions (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - trending-page: Div container
  - trending-list: Div ranked list
  - time-range-filter: Dropdown select (Last 24 Hours, This Week, All Time)
  - view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}: Button per item
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - view-auction-button: url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, bid_count, current_bid, trending_rank}

### 9. Auction Status Page
- Template Filename: templates/auction_status.html
- Page Title: Auction Status
- Header Title: Auction Status (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - status-page: Div container
  - status-filter: Dropdown (All, Active, Closed, Upcoming)
  - status-table: Table with columns name, status, time remaining, current bid
  - refresh-status-button: Button
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - refresh-status-button: POST to url_for('refresh_status')
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, status, current_bid, end_time}

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. Auctions Data
- Path: data/auctions.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. auction_id (int)
  2. item_name (str)
  3. description (str)
  4. category (str)
  5. starting_bid (float)
  6. current_bid (float)
  7. end_time (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
  8. status (str) (e.g., Active, Closed)
  9. image_url (str)
- Description: Stores all auction items with details including bidding status and image
- Example Data Rows:
  1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg
  2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg
  3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg

### 2. Categories Data
- Path: data/categories.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. category_id (int)
  2. category_name (str)
  3. description (str)
  4. item_count (int)
- Description: Stores all auction categories with description and item counts
- Example Data Rows:
  1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15
  2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28
  3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12

### 3. Bids Data
- Path: data/bids.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. bid_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. bidder_name (str)
  4. bid_amount (float)
  5. bid_timestamp (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Description: Stores all bids placed on auctions
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30
  2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45
  3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15

### 4. Winners Data
- Path: data/winners.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. winner_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. item_name (str)
  4. winner_name (str)
  5. winning_bid (float)
  6. win_date (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Stores winning auction items with winner details and winning bid amounts
- Example Data Rows:
  1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08
  2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03
  3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01

### 5. Bid History Data
- Path: data/bid_history.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. history_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. auction_name (str)
  4. bidder_name (str)
  5. bid_amount (float)
  6. bid_timestamp (str, format:YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Description: Stores complete bid history records with auction and bidder info
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00
  2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45
  3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45

### 6. Items Data
- Path: data/items.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. item_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. item_name (str)
  4. starting_price (float)
  5. category (str)
  6. condition (str)
  7. seller_name (str)
- Description: Stores item details for auctions including condition and seller
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector
  2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store
  3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop

### 7. Trending Data
- Path: data/trending.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. auction_id (int)
  2. item_name (str)
  3. bid_count (int)
  4. current_bid (float)
  5. trending_rank (int)
  6. time_period (str)
- Description: Stores ranked trending auction data by bid activity and period
- Example Data Rows:
  2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week
  1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week
  5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week

---

# OnlineAuction Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Backend Routes Specification

| Route Path                 | Function Name          | HTTP Method | Template              | Context Variables                                                                                          |
|----------------------------|------------------------|-------------|-----------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                          | root_redirect          | GET         | None (redirect)       | None                                                                                                       |
| /dashboard                 | dashboard              | GET         | dashboard.html        | featured_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}, trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, bid_count: int}, categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, item_count: int} |
| /catalog                   | auction_catalog        | GET         | catalog.html          | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str} , categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str} |
| /auction/<int:auction_id>  | auction_details        | GET         | auction_details.html  | auction: dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, status: str, image_url: str}, bid_history: list of dict {bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str} |
| /place_bid/<int:auction_id>| place_bid              | GET         | place_bid.html        | auction: dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, minimum_bid: float}                                                                              |
| /submit_bid/<int:auction_id>| submit_bid            | POST        | None (redirect)       | Form data (bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float) - No template                                                                                                         |
| /bid_history               | bid_history            | GET         | bid_history.html      | bids: list of dict {bid_id: int, auction_name: str, bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str}, auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str} |
| /categories               | categories             | GET         | categories.html       | categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, description: str, item_count: int}                                                                  |
| /category/<int:category_id>| category_items         | GET         | catalog.html          | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str}, category_name: str          |
| /winners                  | winners                | GET         | winners.html          | winners: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, winner_name: str, winning_bid: float, win_date: str}                                                          |
| /trending                 | trending_auctions      | GET         | trending.html         | trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, bid_count: int, current_bid: float, trending_rank: int}                                           |
| /auction_status           | auction_status         | GET         | auction_status.html   | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, status: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}                                                             |
| /refresh_status           | refresh_status         | POST        | None (redirect)       | No template                                                                                               |

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Template Filename: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Auction Dashboard
- Header Title: Auction Dashboard (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page: Div container for the dashboard page
  - featured-auctions: Div for featured auction items
  - browse-auctions-button: Button to go to auction catalog
  - view-bids-button: Button to go to bid history
  - trending-auctions-button: Button to go to trending auctions
- Navigation:
  - browse-auctions-button: url_for('auction_catalog')
  - view-bids-button: url_for('bid_history')
  - trending-auctions-button: url_for('trending_auctions')
- Context Variables:
  - featured_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}
  - trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, bid_count: int}
  - categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, item_count: int}

### 2. Auction Catalog Page
- Template Filename: templates/catalog.html
- Page Title: Auction Catalog
- Header Title: Auction Catalog (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - catalog-page: Div container
  - search-input: Input text field
  - category-filter: Dropdown select with options Electronics, Collectibles, Furniture, Art, Other
  - auctions-grid: Div grid for auction cards
  - view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}: Button in each auction card
- Navigation:
  - view-auction-button: url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, description, category, current_bid, end_time, image_url}
  - categories: list of dict {category_id, category_name}

### 3. Auction Details Page
- Template Filename: templates/auction_details.html
- Page Title: Auction Details
- Header Title: Auction Details (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - auction-details-page: Div container
  - auction-title: H1 with auction item title
  - auction-description: Div with item description
  - current-bid: Div with current highest bid
  - place-bid-button: Button to place new bid
  - bid-history: Div showing list of bids with bidder name and amount
- Navigation:
  - place-bid-button: url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auction: dict
  - bid_history: list of dict {bidder_name, bid_amount, bid_timestamp}

### 4. Place Bid Page
- Template Filename: templates/place_bid.html
- Page Title: Place Bid
- Header Title: Place Bid (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - place-bid-page: Div container
  - bidder-name: Input field
  - bid-amount: Input field
  - auction-name: Div showing auction item name
  - minimum-bid: Div showing minimum acceptable bid
  - submit-bid-button: Button to submit
- Navigation:
  - Form POST action to url_for('submit_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auction: dict (auction_id, item_name, current_bid, minimum_bid)

### 5. Bid History Page
- Template Filename: templates/bid_history.html
- Page Title: Bid History
- Header Title: Bid History (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - bid-history-page: Div container
  - bids-table: Table with columns bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp
  - filter-by-auction: Dropdown to filter bids by auction
  - sort-by-amount: Button
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - bids: list of dict {bid_id, auction_name, bidder_name, bid_amount, bid_timestamp}
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name}

### 6. Auction Categories Page
- Template Filename: templates/categories.html
- Page Title: Auction Categories
- Header Title: Auction Categories (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - categories-page: Div container
  - categories-list: Div list
  - category-card-{{ category.category_id }}: Div card for each category
  - view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}: Button in each category card
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - view-category-button: url_for('category_items', category_id=category.category_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - categories: list of dict {category_id, category_name, description, item_count}

### 7. Winners Page
- Template Filename: templates/winners.html
- Page Title: Winning Items
- Header Title: Winning Items (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - winners-page: Div container
  - winners-list: Div list
  - winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}: Div card for each winning item
  - filter-by-winner: Input field
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - winners: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, winner_name, winning_bid, win_date}

### 8. Trending Auctions Page
- Template Filename: templates/trending.html
- Page Title: Trending Auctions
- Header Title: Trending Auctions (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - trending-page: Div container
  - trending-list: Div ranked list
  - time-range-filter: Dropdown select (Last 24 Hours, This Week, All Time)
  - view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}: Button per item
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - view-auction-button: url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, bid_count, current_bid, trending_rank}

### 9. Auction Status Page
- Template Filename: templates/auction_status.html
- Page Title: Auction Status
- Header Title: Auction Status (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - status-page: Div container
  - status-filter: Dropdown (All, Active, Closed, Upcoming)
  - status-table: Table with columns name, status, time remaining, current bid
  - refresh-status-button: Button
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - refresh-status-button: POST to url_for('refresh_status')
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, status, current_bid, end_time}

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. Auctions Data
- Path: data/auctions.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. auction_id (int)
  2. item_name (str)
  3. description (str)
  4. category (str)
  5. starting_bid (float)
  6. current_bid (float)
  7. end_time (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
  8. status (str) (e.g., Active, Closed)
  9. image_url (str)
- Description: Stores all auction items with details including bidding status and image
- Example Data Rows:
  1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg
  2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg
  3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg

### 2. Categories Data
- Path: data/categories.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. category_id (int)
  2. category_name (str)
  3. description (str)
  4. item_count (int)
- Description: Stores all auction categories with description and item counts
- Example Data Rows:
  1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15
  2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28
  3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12

### 3. Bids Data
- Path: data/bids.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. bid_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. bidder_name (str)
  4. bid_amount (float)
  5. bid_timestamp (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Description: Stores all bids placed on auctions
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30
  2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45
  3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15

### 4. Winners Data
- Path: data/winners.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. winner_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. item_name (str)
  4. winner_name (str)
  5. winning_bid (float)
  6. win_date (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Stores winning auction items with winner details and winning bid amounts
- Example Data Rows:
  1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08
  2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03
  3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01

### 5. Bid History Data
- Path: data/bid_history.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. history_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. auction_name (str)
  4. bidder_name (str)
  5. bid_amount (float)
  6. bid_timestamp (str, format:YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Description: Stores complete bid history records with auction and bidder info
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00
  2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45
  3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45

### 6. Items Data
- Path: data/items.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. item_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. item_name (str)
  4. starting_price (float)
  5. category (str)
  6. condition (str)
  7. seller_name (str)
- Description: Stores item details for auctions including condition and seller
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector
  2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store
  3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop

### 7. Trending Data
- Path: data/trending.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. auction_id (int)
  2. item_name (str)
  3. bid_count (int)
  4. current_bid (float)
  5. trending_rank (int)
  6. time_period (str)
- Description: Stores ranked trending auction data by bid activity and period
- Example Data Rows:
  2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week
  1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week
  5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week

   # No specific instructions given about what this does, just redirect back to auction_status\n    return redirect(url_for('auction_status'))\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    app.run(debug=True, port=5000)\n"})

# OnlineAuction Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Backend Routes Specification

| Route Path                 | Function Name          | HTTP Method | Template              | Context Variables                                                                                          |
|----------------------------|------------------------|-------------|-----------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                          | root_redirect          | GET         | None (redirect)       | None                                                                                                       |
| /dashboard                 | dashboard              | GET         | dashboard.html        | featured_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}, trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, bid_count: int}, categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, item_count: int} |
| /catalog                   | auction_catalog        | GET         | catalog.html          | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str} , categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str} |
| /auction/<int:auction_id>  | auction_details        | GET         | auction_details.html  | auction: dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, status: str, image_url: str}, bid_history: list of dict {bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str} |
| /place_bid/<int:auction_id>| place_bid              | GET         | place_bid.html        | auction: dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, minimum_bid: float}                                                                              |
| /submit_bid/<int:auction_id>| submit_bid            | POST        | None (redirect)       | Form data (bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float) - No template                                                                                                         |
| /bid_history               | bid_history            | GET         | bid_history.html      | bids: list of dict {bid_id: int, auction_name: str, bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str}, auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str} |
| /categories               | categories             | GET         | categories.html       | categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, description: str, item_count: int}                                                                  |
| /category/<int:category_id>| category_items         | GET         | catalog.html          | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str}, category_name: str          |
| /winners                  | winners                | GET         | winners.html          | winners: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, winner_name: str, winning_bid: float, win_date: str}                                                          |
| /trending                 | trending_auctions      | GET         | trending.html         | trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, bid_count: int, current_bid: float, trending_rank: int}                                           |
| /auction_status           | auction_status         | GET         | auction_status.html   | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, status: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}                                                             |
| /refresh_status           | refresh_status         | POST        | None (redirect)       | No template                                                                                               |

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Template Filename: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Auction Dashboard
- Header Title: Auction Dashboard (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page: Div container for the dashboard page
  - featured-auctions: Div for featured auction items
  - browse-auctions-button: Button to go to auction catalog
  - view-bids-button: Button to go to bid history
  - trending-auctions-button: Button to go to trending auctions
- Navigation:
  - browse-auctions-button: url_for('auction_catalog')
  - view-bids-button: url_for('bid_history')
  - trending-auctions-button: url_for('trending_auctions')
- Context Variables:
  - featured_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}
  - trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, bid_count: int}
  - categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, item_count: int}

### 2. Auction Catalog Page
- Template Filename: templates/catalog.html
- Page Title: Auction Catalog
- Header Title: Auction Catalog (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - catalog-page: Div container
  - search-input: Input text field
  - category-filter: Dropdown select with options Electronics, Collectibles, Furniture, Art, Other
  - auctions-grid: Div grid for auction cards
  - view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}: Button in each auction card
- Navigation:
  - view-auction-button: url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, description, category, current_bid, end_time, image_url}
  - categories: list of dict {category_id, category_name}

### 3. Auction Details Page
- Template Filename: templates/auction_details.html
- Page Title: Auction Details
- Header Title: Auction Details (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - auction-details-page: Div container
  - auction-title: H1 with auction item title
  - auction-description: Div with item description
  - current-bid: Div with current highest bid
  - place-bid-button: Button to place new bid
  - bid-history: Div showing list of bids with bidder name and amount
- Navigation:
  - place-bid-button: url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auction: dict
  - bid_history: list of dict {bidder_name, bid_amount, bid_timestamp}

### 4. Place Bid Page
- Template Filename: templates/place_bid.html
- Page Title: Place Bid
- Header Title: Place Bid (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - place-bid-page: Div container
  - bidder-name: Input field
  - bid-amount: Input field
  - auction-name: Div showing auction item name
  - minimum-bid: Div showing minimum acceptable bid
  - submit-bid-button: Button to submit
- Navigation:
  - Form POST action to url_for('submit_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auction: dict (auction_id, item_name, current_bid, minimum_bid)

### 5. Bid History Page
- Template Filename: templates/bid_history.html
- Page Title: Bid History
- Header Title: Bid History (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - bid-history-page: Div container
  - bids-table: Table with columns bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp
  - filter-by-auction: Dropdown to filter bids by auction
  - sort-by-amount: Button
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - bids: list of dict {bid_id, auction_name, bidder_name, bid_amount, bid_timestamp}
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name}

### 6. Auction Categories Page
- Template Filename: templates/categories.html
- Page Title: Auction Categories
- Header Title: Auction Categories (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - categories-page: Div container
  - categories-list: Div list
  - category-card-{{ category.category_id }}: Div card for each category
  - view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}: Button in each category card
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - view-category-button: url_for('category_items', category_id=category.category_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - categories: list of dict {category_id, category_name, description, item_count}

### 7. Winners Page
- Template Filename: templates/winners.html
- Page Title: Winning Items
- Header Title: Winning Items (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - winners-page: Div container
  - winners-list: Div list
  - winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}: Div card for each winning item
  - filter-by-winner: Input field
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - winners: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, winner_name, winning_bid, win_date}

### 8. Trending Auctions Page
- Template Filename: templates/trending.html
- Page Title: Trending Auctions
- Header Title: Trending Auctions (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - trending-page: Div container
  - trending-list: Div ranked list
  - time-range-filter: Dropdown select (Last 24 Hours, This Week, All Time)
  - view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}: Button per item
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - view-auction-button: url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, bid_count, current_bid, trending_rank}

### 9. Auction Status Page
- Template Filename: templates/auction_status.html
- Page Title: Auction Status
- Header Title: Auction Status (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - status-page: Div container
  - status-filter: Dropdown (All, Active, Closed, Upcoming)
  - status-table: Table with columns name, status, time remaining, current bid
  - refresh-status-button: Button
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - refresh-status-button: POST to url_for('refresh_status')
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, status, current_bid, end_time}

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. Auctions Data
- Path: data/auctions.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. auction_id (int)
  2. item_name (str)
  3. description (str)
  4. category (str)
  5. starting_bid (float)
  6. current_bid (float)
  7. end_time (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
  8. status (str) (e.g., Active, Closed)
  9. image_url (str)
- Description: Stores all auction items with details including bidding status and image
- Example Data Rows:
  1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg
  2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg
  3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg

### 2. Categories Data
- Path: data/categories.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. category_id (int)
  2. category_name (str)
  3. description (str)
  4. item_count (int)
- Description: Stores all auction categories with description and item counts
- Example Data Rows:
  1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15
  2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28
  3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12

### 3. Bids Data
- Path: data/bids.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. bid_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. bidder_name (str)
  4. bid_amount (float)
  5. bid_timestamp (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Description: Stores all bids placed on auctions
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30
  2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45
  3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15

### 4. Winners Data
- Path: data/winners.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. winner_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. item_name (str)
  4. winner_name (str)
  5. winning_bid (float)
  6. win_date (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Stores winning auction items with winner details and winning bid amounts
- Example Data Rows:
  1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08
  2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03
  3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01

### 5. Bid History Data
- Path: data/bid_history.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. history_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. auction_name (str)
  4. bidder_name (str)
  5. bid_amount (float)
  6. bid_timestamp (str, format:YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Description: Stores complete bid history records with auction and bidder info
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00
  2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45
  3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45

### 6. Items Data
- Path: data/items.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. item_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. item_name (str)
  4. starting_price (float)
  5. category (str)
  6. condition (str)
  7. seller_name (str)
- Description: Stores item details for auctions including condition and seller
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector
  2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store
  3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop

### 7. Trending Data
- Path: data/trending.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. auction_id (int)
  2. item_name (str)
  3. bid_count (int)
  4. current_bid (float)
  5. trending_rank (int)
  6. time_period (str)
- Description: Stores ranked trending auction data by bid activity and period
- Example Data Rows:
  2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week
  1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week
  5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week

---

or not bid_amount_str:\n        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))\n    try:\n        bid_amount = float(bid_amount_str)\n    except ValueError:\n        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))\n\n    auctions = load_auctions()\n    auction = None\n    for a in auctions:\n        if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:\n            auction = a\n            break\n    if auction is None:\n        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))\n\n    minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01\n    if bid_amount < minimum_bid:\n        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))\n\n    now_time = datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')\n\n    bids = load_bids()\n    new_bid_id = max([b['bid_id'] for b in bids], default=0) + 1\n    new_bid = {\n        'bid_id': new_bid_id,\n        'auction_id': auction_id,\n        'bidder_name': bidder_name,\n        'bid_amount': bid_amount,\n        'bid_timestamp': now_time,\n    }\n    bids.append(new_bid)\n    save_bids(bids)\n\n    # Update auction current_bid\n    for a in auctions:\n        if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:\n            a['current_bid'] = bid_amount\n            break\n    save_auctions(auctions)\n\n    # Append to bid history\n    bid_history = load_bid_history()\n    new_history_id = max([h['history_id'] for h in bid_history], default=0) + 1\n    new_history = {\n        'history_id': new_history_id,\n        'auction_id': auction_id,\n        'auction_name': auction['item_name'],\n        'bidder_name': bidder_name,\n        'bid_amount': bid_amount,\n        'bid_timestamp': now_time,\n    }\n    bid_history.append(new_history)\n    save_bid_history(bid_history)\n\n    return redirect(url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction_id))\n\n\n@app.route('/bid_history')\ndef bid_history():\n    bid_history_raw = load_bid_history()\n    bids = []\n    for b in bid_history_raw:\n        bids.append({\n            'bid_id': b['history_id'],\n            'auction_name': b['auction_name'],\n            'bidder_name': b['bidder_name'],\n            'bid_amount': b['bid_amount'],\n            'bid_timestamp': b['bid_timestamp'],\n        })\n    auctions_raw = load_auctions()\n    auctions = [{'auction_id': a['auction_id'], 'item_name': a['item_name']} for a in auctions_raw]\n    return render_template('bid_history.html', bids=bids, auctions=auctions)\n\n\n@app.route('/categories')\ndef categories():\n    categories_data = load_categories()\n    categories_context = []\n    for c in categories_data:\n        categories_context.append({\n            'category_id': c['category_id'],\n            'category_name': c['category_name'],\n            'description': c['description'],\n            'item_count': c['item_count'],\n        })\n    return render_template('categories.html', categories=categories_context)\n\n\n@app.route('/category/<int:category_id>')\ndef category_items(category_id):\n    categories = load_categories()\n    category_name = None\n    for c in categories:\n        if c['category_id'] == category_id:\n            category_name = c['category_name']\n            break\n    if category_name is None:\n        return redirect(url_for('categories'))\n\n    auctions = load_auctions()\n    filtered_auctions = []\n    for a in auctions:\n        if a['category'] == category_name:\n            filtered_auctions.append({\n                'auction_id': a['auction_id'],\n                'item_name': a['item_name'],\n                'description': a['description'],\n                'category': a['category'],\n                'current_bid': a['current_bid'],\n                'end_time': a['end_time'],\n                'image_url': a['image_url'],\n            })\n\n    return render_template('catalog.html', auctions=filtered_auctions, category_name=category_name)\n\n\n@app.route('/winners')\ndef winners():\n    winners_raw = load_winners()\n    winners_context = []\n    for w in winners_raw:\n        winners_context.append({\n            'auction_id': w['auction_id'],\n            'item_name': w['item_name'],\n            'winner_name': w['winner_name'],\n            'winning_bid': w['winning_bid'],\n            'win_date': w['win_date'],\n        })\n    return render_template('winners.html', winners=winners_context)\n\n\n@app.route('/trending')\ndef trending_auctions():\n    trending_data = load_trending()\n    trending_sorted = sorted(trending_data, key=lambda t: t['trending_rank'])\n    trending_context = []\n    for t in trending_sorted:\n        trending_context.append({\n            'auction_id': t['auction_id'],\n            'item_name': t['item_name'],\n            'bid_count': t['bid_count'],\n            'current_bid': t['current_bid'],\n            'trending_rank': t['trending_rank'],\n        })\n    return render_template('trending.html', trending_auctions=trending_context)\n\n\n@app.route('/auction_status')\ndef auction_status():\n    auctions = load_auctions()\n    auctions_context = []\n    for a in auctions:\n        auctions_context.append({\n            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],\n            'item_name': a['item_name'],\n            'status': a['status'],\n            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],\n            'end_time': a['end_time'],\n        })\n    return render_template('auction_status.html', auctions=auctions_context)\n\n\n@app.route('/refresh_status', methods=['POST'])\ndef refresh_status():\n    # Just redirect to auction_status page\n    return # OnlineAuction Application Design Specification
