## Section 1: Flask Backend Routes Specification

| Route Path                 | Function Name          | HTTP Method | Template              | Context Variables                                                                                          |
|----------------------------|------------------------|-------------|-----------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                          | root_redirect          | GET         | None (redirect)       | None                                                                                                       |
| /dashboard                 | dashboard              | GET         | dashboard.html        | featured_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}, trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, bid_count: int}, categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, item_count: int} |
| /catalog                   | auction_catalog        | GET         | catalog.html          | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str} , categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str} |
| /auction/<int:auction_id>  | auction_details        | GET         | auction_details.html  | auction: dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, status: str, image_url: str}, bid_history: list of dict {bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str} |
| /place_bid/<int:auction_id>| place_bid              | GET         | place_bid.html        | auction: dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, minimum_bid: float}                                                                              |
| /submit_bid/<int:auction_id>| submit_bid            | POST        | None (redirect)       | Form data (bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float) - No template                                                                                                         |
| /bid_history               | bid_history            | GET         | bid_history.html      | bids: list of dict {bid_id: int, auction_name: str, bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str}, auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str} |
| /categories               | categories             | GET         | categories.html       | categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, description: str, item_count: int}                                                                  |
| /category/<int:category_id>| category_items         | GET         | catalog.html          | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str}, category_name: str          |
| /winners                  | winners                | GET         | winners.html          | winners: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, winner_name: str, winning_bid: float, win_date: str}                                                          |
| /trending                 | trending_auctions      | GET         | trending.html         | trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, bid_count: int, current_bid: float, trending_rank: int}                                           |
| /auction_status           | auction_status         | GET         | auction_status.html   | auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, status: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}                                                             |
| /refresh_status           | refresh_status         | POST        | None (redirect)       | No template                                                                                               |

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Template Filename: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Auction Dashboard
- Header Title: Auction Dashboard (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page: Div container for the dashboard page
  - featured-auctions: Div for featured auction items
  - browse-auctions-button: Button to go to auction catalog
  - view-bids-button: Button to go to bid history
  - trending-auctions-button: Button to go to trending auctions
- Navigation:
  - browse-auctions-button: url_for('auction_catalog')
  - view-bids-button: url_for('bid_history')
  - trending-auctions-button: url_for('trending_auctions')
- Context Variables:
  - featured_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str}
  - trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, bid_count: int}
  - categories: list of dict {category_id: int, category_name: str, item_count: int}

### 2. Auction Catalog Page
- Template Filename: templates/catalog.html
- Page Title: Auction Catalog
- Header Title: Auction Catalog (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - catalog-page: Div container
  - search-input: Input text field
  - category-filter: Dropdown select with options Electronics, Collectibles, Furniture, Art, Other
  - auctions-grid: Div grid for auction cards
  - view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}: Button in each auction card
- Navigation:
  - view-auction-button: url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, description, category, current_bid, end_time, image_url}
  - categories: list of dict {category_id, category_name}

### 3. Auction Details Page
- Template Filename: templates/auction_details.html
- Page Title: Auction Details
- Header Title: Auction Details (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - auction-details-page: Div container
  - auction-title: H1 with auction item title
  - auction-description: Div with item description
  - current-bid: Div with current highest bid
  - place-bid-button: Button to place new bid
  - bid-history: Div showing list of bids with bidder name and amount
- Navigation:
  - place-bid-button: url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auction: dict
  - bid_history: list of dict {bidder_name, bid_amount, bid_timestamp}

### 4. Place Bid Page
- Template Filename: templates/place_bid.html
- Page Title: Place Bid
- Header Title: Place Bid (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - place-bid-page: Div container
  - bidder-name: Input field
  - bid-amount: Input field
  - auction-name: Div showing auction item name
  - minimum-bid: Div showing minimum acceptable bid
  - submit-bid-button: Button to submit
- Navigation:
  - Form POST action to url_for('submit_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
- Context Variables:
  - auction: dict (auction_id, item_name, current_bid, minimum_bid)

### 5. Bid History Page
- Template Filename: templates/bid_history.html
- Page Title: Bid History
- Header Title: Bid History (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - bid-history-page: Div container
  - bids-table: Table with columns bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp
  - filter-by-auction: Dropdown to filter bids by auction
  - sort-by-amount: Button
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - bids: list of dict {bid_id, auction_name, bidder_name, bid_amount, bid_timestamp}
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name}

### 6. Auction Categories Page
- Template Filename: templates/categories.html
- Page Title: Auction Categories
- Header Title: Auction Categories (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - categories-page: Div container
  - categories-list: Div list
  - category-card-{{ category.category_id }}: Div card for each category
  - view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}: Button in each category card
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - view-category-button: url_for('category_items', category_id=category.category_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - categories: list of dict {category_id, category_name, description, item_count}

### 7. Winners Page
- Template Filename: templates/winners.html
- Page Title: Winning Items
- Header Title: Winning Items (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - winners-page: Div container
  - winners-list: Div list
  - winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}: Div card for each winning item
  - filter-by-winner: Input field
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - winners: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, winner_name, winning_bid, win_date}

### 8. Trending Auctions Page
- Template Filename: templates/trending.html
- Page Title: Trending Auctions
- Header Title: Trending Auctions (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - trending-page: Div container
  - trending-list: Div ranked list
  - time-range-filter: Dropdown select (Last 24 Hours, This Week, All Time)
  - view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}: Button per item
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - view-auction-button: url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id)
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - trending_auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, bid_count, current_bid, trending_rank}

### 9. Auction Status Page
- Template Filename: templates/auction_status.html
- Page Title: Auction Status
- Header Title: Auction Status (in <h1>)
- Element IDs:
  - status-page: Div container
  - status-filter: Dropdown (All, Active, Closed, Upcoming)
  - status-table: Table with columns name, status, time remaining, current bid
  - refresh-status-button: Button
  - back-to-dashboard: Button
- Navigation:
  - refresh-status-button: POST to url_for('refresh_status')
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Context Variables:
  - auctions: list of dict {auction_id, item_name, status, current_bid, end_time}

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. Auctions Data
- Path: data/auctions.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. auction_id (int)
  2. item_name (str)
  3. description (str)
  4. category (str)
  5. starting_bid (float)
  6. current_bid (float)
  7. end_time (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
  8. status (str) (e.g., Active, Closed)
  9. image_url (str)
- Description: Stores all auction items with details including bidding status and image
- Example Data Rows:
  1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg
  2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg
  3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg

### 2. Categories Data
- Path: data/categories.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. category_id (int)
  2. category_name (str)
  3. description (str)
  4. item_count (int)
- Description: Stores all auction categories with description and item counts
- Example Data Rows:
  1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15
  2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28
  3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12

### 3. Bids Data
- Path: data/bids.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. bid_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. bidder_name (str)
  4. bid_amount (float)
  5. bid_timestamp (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Description: Stores all bids placed on auctions
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30
  2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45
  3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15

### 4. Winners Data
- Path: data/winners.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. winner_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. item_name (str)
  4. winner_name (str)
  5. winning_bid (float)
  6. win_date (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD)
- Description: Stores winning auction items with winner details and winning bid amounts
- Example Data Rows:
  1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08
  2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03
  3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01

### 5. Bid History Data
- Path: data/bid_history.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. history_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. auction_name (str)
  4. bidder_name (str)
  5. bid_amount (float)
  6. bid_timestamp (str, format:YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Description: Stores complete bid history records with auction and bidder info
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00
  2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45
  3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45

### 6. Items Data
- Path: data/items.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. item_id (int)
  2. auction_id (int)
  3. item_name (str)
  4. starting_price (float)
  5. category (str)
  6. condition (str)
  7. seller_name (str)
- Description: Stores item details for auctions including condition and seller
- Example Data Rows:
  1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector
  2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store
  3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop

### 7. Trending Data
- Path: data/trending.txt
- File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line
- Fields:
  1. auction_id (int)
  2. item_name (str)
  3. bid_count (int)
  4. current_bid (float)
  5. trending_rank (int)
  6. time_period (str)
- Description: Stores ranked trending auction data by bid activity and period
- Example Data Rows:
  2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week
  1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week
  5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week

---

          'bid_amount': float(parts[4]),\n                            'bid_timestamp': parts[5]\n                        })\n                    except:\n                        pass\n    return history\n\ndef save_bid_history(history):\n    lines = []\n    for h in history:\n        lines.append('|'.join([\n            str(h['history_id']),\n            str(h['auction_id']),\n            h['auction_name'],\n            h['bidder_name'],\n            f\"{h['bid_amount']:.2f}\",\n            h['bid_timestamp']\n        ]))\n    with open(BID_HISTORY_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        f.write('\\n'.join(lines))\n\n\ndef load_trending():\n    trending = []\n    if os.path.exists(TRENDING_FILE):\n        with open(TRENDING_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                parts = line.strip().split('|')\n                if len(parts) == 6:\n                    try:\n                        trending.append({\n                            'auction_id': int(parts[0]),\n                            'item_name': parts[1],\n                            'bid_count': int(parts[2]),\n                            'current_bid': float(parts[3]),\n                            'trending_rank': int(parts[4]),\n                            'time_period': parts[5]\n                        })\n                    except:\n                        pass\n    return trending\n\n\n# Flask routes\n\n@app.route('/')\ndef root_redirect():\n    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))\n\n\n@app.route('/dashboard')\ndef dashboard():\n    auctions = load_auctions()\n    categories = load_categories()\n    trending_data = load_trending()\n\n    featured_auctions = []\n    active_auctions = [a for a in auctions if a['status'] == 'Active']\n    sorted_active = sorted(active_auctions, key=lambda x: (-x['current_bid'], x['end_time']))\n    for a in sorted_active[:3]:\n        featured_auctions.append({\n            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],\n            'item_name': a['item_name'],\n            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],\n            'end_time': a['end_time']\n        })\n\n    trending_auctions = []\n    sorted_trending = sorted(trending_data, key=lambda t: t['trending_rank'])\n    for t in sorted_trending[:3]:\n        trending_auctions.append({\n            'auction_id': t['auction_id'],\n categories_context.append({\n            'category_id': c['category_id'],\n            'category_name': c['category_name'],\n            'item_count': c['item_count']\n        })\n\n    return a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)\n    if not auction:\n        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))\n\n    bid_history_raw = load_bid_history()\n    bid_history = [\n        {\n auctions = load_auctions()\n    auction = next((a for a in auctions if a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)\n    if not auction:\n        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))\n\n    minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01\n    auction_context = {\n        'auction_id': auction['auction_id'],\n        'item_name': auction['item_name'],\n        'current_bid': auction['current_bid'],\n        'minimum_bid': round(minimum_bid, 2)\n    }\n\n    return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction_context)\n\n\n@app.route('/submit_bid/<int:auction_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef submit_bid(auction_id):\n    bidder_name = request.form.get('bidder_name', '').strip()\n    bid_amount_str = request.form.get('bid_amount', '').strip()\n\n    if not bidder_name or not bid_amount_str:\n        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))\n\n    try:\n        bid_amount = float(bid_amount_str)\n    except ValueError:\n        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))\n\n    auctions = load_auctions()\n    auction = next((a for a in auctions if a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)\n    if not auction:\n        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))\n\n    minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01\n    if bid_amount < minimum_bid:\n        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))\n\n    now = datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')\n    bids = load_bids()\n    new_bid_id = max([b['bid_id'] for b in bids], default=0) + 1\n    new_bid = {\n        'bid_id': new_bid_id,\n        'auction_id': auction_id,\n        'bidder_name': bidder_name,\n        'bid_amount': bid_amount,\n        'bid_timestamp': now\n    }\n    bids.append(new_bid)\n    save_bids(bids)\n\n    # Update auction current bid\n    for a in auctions:\n        if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:\n            a['current_bid'] = bid_amount\n            break\n    save_auctions(auctions)\n\n    # Append to bid history\n    bid_history = load_bid_history()\n    new_history_id = max([h['history_id'] for h in bid_history], default=0) + 1\n    new_history = {\n        'history_id': new_history_id,\n        'auction_id': auction_id,\n        'auction_name': auction['item_name'],\n        'bidder_name': bidder_name,\n        'bid_amount': bid_amount,\n        'bid_timestamp': now\n    }\n    bid_history.append(new_history)\n    save_bid_history(bid_history)\n\n    return redirect(url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction_id))\n\n\n@app.route('/bid_history')\ndef bid_history():\n    bid_history_raw = load_bid_history()\n h['bid_amount'],\n            'bid_timestamp': h['bid_timestamp']\n        }\n        for h in bid_history_raw\n    ]\n    auctions_raw = load_auctions()\n    auctions = [{'auction_id': a['auction_id'], 'item_name': a['item_name']} for a in auctions_raw]\n    return render_template('bid_history.html', bids=bids, auctions=auctions)\n\n\n@app.route('/categories')\ndef categories():\n categories=categories_context)\n\n\n@app.route('/category/<int:category_id>')\ndef category_items(category_id):\n    categories = load_categories()\n    category_name = None\n    for c in Auctions Data - Path: data/auctions.txt - File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line - Fields:   1. auction_id (int)   2. item_name (str)   3. description (str)   4. category (str)   5. starting_bid (float)   6. current_bid (float)   7. end_time (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)   8. status (str) (e.g., Active, Closed)   9. image_url (str) - Description: Stores all auction items with details including bidding status and image - Example Data Rows:   1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg   2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg   3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg  ### 2. Categories Data - Path: data/categories.txt - File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line - Fields:   1. category_id (int)   2. category_name (str)   3. description (str)   4. item_count (int) - Description: Stores all auction categories with description and item counts - Example Data Rows:   1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15   2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28   3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12  ### 3. Bids Data - Path: data/bids.txt - File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line - Fields:   1. bid_id (int)   2. auction_id (int)   3. bidder_name (str)   4. bid_amount (float)   5. bid_timestamp (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - Description: Stores all bids placed on auctions - Example Data Rows:   1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30   2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45   3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15  ### 4. Winners Data - Path: data/winners.txt - File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line - Fields:   1. winner_id (int)   2. auction_id (int)   3. item_name (str)   4. winner_name (str)   5. winning_bid (float)   6. win_date (str, format: YYYY-MM-DD) - Description: Stores winning auction items with winner details and winning bid amounts - Example Data Rows:   1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08   2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03   3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01  ### 5. Bid History Data - Path: data/bid_history.txt - File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line - Fields:   1. history_id (int)   2. auction_id (int)   3. auction_name (str)   4. bidder_name (str)   5. bid_amount (float)   6. bid_timestamp (str, format:YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - Description: Stores complete bid history records with auction and bidder info - Example Data Rows:   1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00   2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45   3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45  ### 6. Items Data - Path: data/items.txt - File Format: Pipe-delimited (|), no header line - Fields:   1. item_id (int)   2. auction_id (int)   3. item_name (str)   4. starting_price (float)   5. category (str)   6. condition (str)   7. seller_name (str) - Description: Stores item details for auctions including condition and seller - Example Data Rows:   1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector   2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store   3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop  ### 7. auction = next((a for a in auctions if a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)\n    if auction is None:\n        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))\n\n    minimum_bid = or not bid_amount_str:\n        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))\n\n    try:\n        bid_amount = float(bid_amount_str)\n    except ValueError:\n        return 1\n    new_bid = {\n        'bid_id': new_bid_id,\n        'auction_id': auction_id,\n        'bidder_name': bidder_name,\n        'bid_amount': bid_amount,\n        'bid_timestamp': now_str\n    }\n <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Auction Details</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="auction-details-page">
        <h1>Auction Details</h1>
        <h1 id="auction-title">{{ auction.item_name }}</h1>
        <div id="auction-description">
            {{ auction.description }}
        </div>
        <div id="current-bid">
            Current Bid: ${{ '%.2f'|format(auction.current_bid) }}
        </div>
        <a href="{{ url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id) }}">
            <button id="place-bid-button">Place Bid</button>
        </a>
        <div id="bid-history">
            <h3>Bid History</h3>
            <ul>
                {% for bid in bid_history %}
                <li>{{ bid.bidder_name }}: ${{ '%.2f'|format(bid.bid_amount) }} at {{ bid.bid_timestamp }}</li>
                {% endfor %}
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Auction Status</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="status-page">
        <h1>Auction Status</h1>
        <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('refresh_status') }}">
            <label for="status-filter">Filter Status:</label>
            <select id="status-filter" name="status-filter">
                <option>All</option>
                <option>Active</option>
                <option>Closed</option>
                <option>Upcoming</option>
            </select>
            <button type="submit" id="refresh-status-button">Refresh Status</button>
        </form>
        <table id="status-table" border="1">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Name</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Time Remaining</th>
                    <th>Current Bid</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for auction in auctions %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ auction.item_name }}</td>
                    <td>{{ auction.status }}</td>
                    <td>{{ auction.end_time }}</td>
                    <td>${{ '%.2f'|format(auction.current_bid) }}</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        <a href="{{ url_for('dashboard') }}"><button id="back-to-dashboard">Back to Dashboard</button></a>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Bid History</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="bid-history-page">
        <h1>Bid History</h1>
        <label for="filter-by-auction">Filter by Auction:</label>
        <select id="filter-by-auction" name="filter-by-auction">
            <option value="all">All</option>
            {% for auction in auctions %}
            <option value="{{ auction.auction_id }}">{{ auction.item_name }}</option>
            {% endfor %}
        </select>
        <button id="sort-by-amount">Sort by Amount</button>
        <table id="bids-table" border="1">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Bid ID</th>
                    <th>Auction Name</th>
                    <th>Bidder</th>
                    <th>Amount</th>
                    <th>Timestamp</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for bid in bids %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ bid.bid_id }}</td>
                    <td>{{ bid.auction_name }}</td>
                    <td>{{ bid.bidder_name }}</td>
                    <td>${{ '%.2f'|format(bid.bid_amount) }}</td>
                    <td>{{ bid.bid_timestamp }}</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        <a href="{{ url_for('dashboard') }}"><button id="back-to-dashboard">Back to Dashboard</button></a>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Auction Catalog</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="catalog-page">
        <h1>Auction Catalog</h1>
        <input type="text" id="search-input" placeholder="Search auctions...">
        <select id="category-filter">
            <option>Electronics</option>
            <option>Collectibles</option>
            <option>Furniture</option>
            <option>Art</option>
            <option>Other</option>
        </select>
        <div id="auctions-grid">
            {% for auction in auctions %}
            <div class="auction-card">
                <h3>{{ auction.item_name }}</h3>
                <img src="{{ auction.image_url }}" alt="{{ auction.item_name }}">
                <p>{{ auction.description }}</p>
                <p>Category: {{ auction.category }}</p>
                <p>Current Bid: ${{ '%.2f'|format(auction.current_bid) }}</p>
                <p>Ends: {{ auction.end_time }}</p>
                <a href="{{ url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id) }}">
                    <button id="view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}">View Details</button>
                </a>
            </div>
            {% endfor %}
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Place Bid</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="place-bid-page">
        <h1>Place Bid</h1>
        <div id="auction-name">
            {{ auction.item_name }}
        </div>
        <div id="minimum-bid">
            Minimum Bid: ${{ '%.2f'|format(auction.minimum_bid) }}
        </div>
        <form method="POST" action="{{ url_for('submit_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id) }}">
            <label for="bidder-name">Your Name:</label>
            <input type="text" id="bidder-name" name="bidder_name" required>
            <label for="bid-amount">Bid Amount:</label>
            <input type="number" step="0.01" id="bid-amount" name="bid_amount" required>
            <button type="submit" id="submit-bid-button">Submit Bid</button>
        </form>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Trending Auctions</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="trending-page">
        <h1>Trending Auctions</h1>
        <select id="time-range-filter">

            <option>This Week</option>
            <option>All Time</option>
        </select>
        <div id="trending-list">
            {% for auction in trending_auctions|sort(attribute='trending_rank') %}

                <span>{{ auction.item_name }}</span>
                <span>Bids: {{ auction.bid_count }}</span>
                <span>Current Bid: ${{ '%.2f'|format(auction.current_bid) }}</span>
                <a href="{{ url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction.auction_id) }}">

                </a>

=== app.py ===
from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request
import os
from datetime import datetime

app = Flask(__name__)
app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'dev-secret-key'

# Filepaths
AUCTIONS_FILE = "data/auctions.txt"
CATEGORIES_FILE = "data/categories.txt"
BIDS_FILE = "data/bids.txt"
WINNERS_FILE = "data/winners.txt"
BID_HISTORY_FILE = "data/bid_history.txt"
ITEMS_FILE = "data/items.txt"
TRENDING_FILE = "data/trending.txt"

# Helper functions to load and save data

def load_auctions():
    auctions = []
    if os.path.exists(AUCTIONS_FILE):
        with open(AUCTIONS_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 9:
                    try:
                        auctions.append({
                            'auction_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'item_name': parts[1],
                            'description': parts[2],
                            'category': parts[3],
                            'starting_bid': float(parts[4]),
                            'current_bid': float(parts[5]),
                            'end_time': parts[6],
                            'status': parts[7],
                            'image_url': parts[8]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return auctions

def save_auctions(auctions):
    lines = []
    for a in auctions:
        lines.append('|'.join([
            str(a['auction_id']),
            a['item_name'],
            a['description'],
            a['category'],
            f"{a['starting_bid']:.2f}",
            f"{a['current_bid']:.2f}",
            a['end_time'],
            a['status'],
            a['image_url']
        ]))
    with open(AUCTIONS_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('\n'.join(lines))


def load_categories():
    categories = []
    if os.path.exists(CATEGORIES_FILE):
        with open(CATEGORIES_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 4:
                    try:
                        categories.append({
                            'category_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'category_name': parts[1],
                            'description': parts[2],
                            'item_count': int(parts[3])
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return categories

def load_bids():
    bids = []
    if os.path.exists(BIDS_FILE):
        with open(BIDS_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 5:
                    try:
                        bids.append({
                            'bid_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'auction_id': int(parts[1]),
                            'bidder_name': parts[2],
                            'bid_amount': float(parts[3]),
                            'bid_timestamp': parts[4]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return bids

def save_bids(bids):
    lines = []
    for b in bids:
        lines.append('|'.join([
            str(b['bid_id']),
            str(b['auction_id']),
            b['bidder_name'],
            f"{b['bid_amount']:.2f}",
            b['bid_timestamp']
        ]))
    with open(BIDS_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('\n'.join(lines))

def load_winners():
    winners = []
    if os.path.exists(WINNERS_FILE):
        with open(WINNERS_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 6:
                    try:
                        winners.append({
                            'winner_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'auction_id': int(parts[1]),
                            'item_name': parts[2],
                            'winner_name': parts[3],
                            'winning_bid': float(parts[4]),
                            'win_date': parts[5]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return winners

def load_bid_history():
    history = []
    if os.path.exists(BID_HISTORY_FILE):
        with open(BID_HISTORY_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 6:
                    try:
                        history.append({
                            'history_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'auction_id': int(parts[1]),
                            'auction_name': parts[2],
                            'bidder_name': parts[3],
                            'bid_amount': float(parts[4]),
                            'bid_timestamp': parts[5]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return history

def save_bid_history(history):
    lines = []
    for h in history:
        lines.append('|'.join([
            str(h['history_id']),
            str(h['auction_id']),
            h['auction_name'],
            h['bidder_name'],
            f"{h['bid_amount']:.2f}",
            h['bid_timestamp']
        ]))
    with open(BID_HISTORY_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('\n'.join(lines))

def load_trending():
    trending = []
    if os.path.exists(TRENDING_FILE):
        with open(TRENDING_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 6:
                    try:
                        trending.append({
                            'auction_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'item_name': parts[1],
                            'bid_count': int(parts[2]),
                            'current_bid': float(parts[3]),
                            'trending_rank': int(parts[4]),
                            'time_period': parts[5]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return trending

# Routes

@app.route('/')
def root_redirect():
    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))

@app.route('/dashboard')
def dashboard():
    auctions = load_auctions()
    categories = load_categories()
    trending = load_trending()

    featured_auctions = []
    active_auctions = [a for a in auctions if a['status'] == 'Active']
    sorted_active = sorted(active_auctions, key=lambda a: (-a['current_bid'], a['end_time']))
    for a in sorted_active[:3]:
        featured_auctions.append({
            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
            'item_name': a['item_name'],
            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
            'end_time': a['end_time']
        })

    trending_auctions = []
    sorted_trending = sorted(trending, key=lambda t: t['trending_rank'])
    for t in sorted_trending[:3]:
        trending_auctions.append({
            'auction_id': t['auction_id'],
            'item_name': t['item_name'],
            'current_bid': t['current_bid'],
            'bid_count': t['bid_count']
        })

    categories_context = []
    for c in categories:
        categories_context.append({
            'category_id': c['category_id'],
            'category_name': c['category_name'],
            'item_count': c['item_count']
        })

    return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_auctions=featured_auctions, trending_auctions=trending_auctions, categories=categories_context)

@app.route('/catalog')
def auction_catalog():
    auctions = load_auctions()
    categories = load_categories()

    auctions_context = []
    for a in auctions:
        auctions_context.append({
            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
            'item_name': a['item_name'],
            'description': a['description'],
            'category': a['category'],
            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
            'end_time': a['end_time'],
            'image_url': a['image_url']
        })

    categories_context = []
    for c in categories:
        categories_context.append({
            'category_id': c['category_id'],
            'category_name': c['category_name']
        })

    return render_template('catalog.html', auctions=auctions_context, categories=categories_context)

@app.route('/auction/<int:auction_id>')
def auction_details(auction_id):
    auctions = load_auctions()
    auction = next((a for a in auctions if a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)
    if auction is None:
        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))

    bid_history_all = load_bid_history()
    bid_history = [
        {'bidder_name': b['bidder_name'], 'bid_amount': b['bid_amount'], 'bid_timestamp': b['bid_timestamp']}
        for b in bid_history_all if b['auction_id'] == auction_id
    ]

    return render_template('auction_details.html', auction=auction, bid_history=bid_history)

@app.route('/place_bid/<int:auction_id>')
def place_bid(auction_id):
    auctions = load_auctions()
    auction = next((a for a in auctions if a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)
    if auction is None:
        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))

    minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01

    auction_context = {
        'auction_id': auction['auction_id'],
        'item_name': auction['item_name'],
        'current_bid': auction['current_bid'],
        'minimum_bid': round(minimum_bid, 2)
    }
    return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction_context)

@app.route('/submit_bid/<int:auction_id>', methods=['POST'])
def submit_bid(auction_id):
    bidder_name = request.form.get('bidder_name', '').strip()
    bid_amount_str = request.form.get('bid_amount', '').strip()

    if not bidder_name or not bid_amount_str:
        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))
    try:
        bid_amount = float(bid_amount_str)
    except ValueError:
        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))

    auctions = load_auctions()
    auction = next((a for a in auctions if a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)
    if auction is None:
        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))

    minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01
    if bid_amount < minimum_bid:
        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))

    now_str = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')

    bids = load_bids()
    new_bid_id = max((b['bid_id'] for b in bids), default=0) + 1
    new_bid = {
        'bid_id': new_bid_id,
        'auction_id': auction_id,
        'bidder_name': bidder_name,
        'bid_amount': bid_amount,
        'bid_timestamp': now_str
    }
    bids.append(new_bid)
    save_bids(bids)

    # Update auction current_bid
    for a in auctions:
        if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:
            a['current_bid'] = bid_amount
            break
    save_auctions(auctions)

    # Append to bid history
    bid_history = load_bid_history()
    new_history_id = max((h['history_id'] for h in bid_history), default=0) + 1
    new_history = {
        'history_id': new_history_id,
        'auction_id': auction_id,
        'auction_name': auction['item_name'],
        'bidder_name': bidder_name,
        'bid_amount': bid_amount,
        'bid_timestamp': now_str
    }
    bid_history.append(new_history)
    save_bid_history(bid_history)

    return redirect(url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction_id))

@app.route('/bid_history')
def bid_history():
    bid_history_raw = load_bid_history()
    bids = [
        {
            'bid_id': h['history_id'],
            'auction_name': h['auction_name'],
            'bidder_name': h['bidder_name'],
            'bid_amount': h['bid_amount'],
            'bid_timestamp': h['bid_timestamp']
        }
        for h in bid_history_raw
    ]
    auctions_raw = load_auctions()
    auctions = [{'auction_id': a['auction_id'], 'item_name': a['item_name']} for a in auctions_raw]
    return render_template('bid_history.html', bids=bids, auctions=auctions)

@app.route('/categories')
def categories():
    categories_raw = load_categories()
    categories_context = []
    for c in categories_raw:
        categories_context.append({
            'category_id': c['category_id'],
            'category_name': c['category_name'],
            'description': c['description'],
            'item_count': c['item_count']
        })
    return render_template('categories.html', categories=categories_context)

@app.route('/category/<int:category_id>')
def category_items(category_id):
    categories = load_categories()
    category_name = None
    for c in categories:
        if c['category_id'] == category_id:
            category_name = c['category_name']
            break
    if category_name is None:
        return redirect(url_for('categories'))

    auctions = load_auctions()
    filtered_auctions = []
    for a in auctions:
        if a['category'] == category_name:
            filtered_auctions.append({
                'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
                'item_name': a['item_name'],
                'description': a['description'],
                'category': a['category'],
                'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
                'end_time': a['end_time'],
                'image_url': a['image_url']
            })

    return render_template('catalog.html', auctions=filtered_auctions, category_name=category_name)

@app.route('/winners')
def winners():
    winners_raw = load_winners()
    winners_context = []
    for w in winners_raw:
        winners_context.append({
            'auction_id': w['auction_id'],
            'item_name': w['item_name'],
            'winner_name': w['winner_name'],
            'winning_bid': w['winning_bid'],
            'win_date': w['win_date']
        })
    return render_template('winners.html', winners=winners_context)

@app.route('/trending')
def trending_auctions():
    trending_data = load_trending()
    sorted_trending = sorted(trending_data, key=lambda t: t['trending_rank'])
    trending_context = []
    for t in sorted_trending:
        trending_context.append({
            'auction_id': t['auction_id'],
            'item_name': t['item_name'],
            'bid_count': t['bid_count'],
            'current_bid': t['current_bid'],
            'trending_rank': t['trending_rank']
        })
    return render_template('trending.html', trending_auctions=trending_context)

@app.route('/auction_status')
def auction_status():
    auctions = load_auctions()
    auctions_context = []
    for a in auctions:
        auctions_context.append({
            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
            'item_name': a['item_name'],
            'status': a['status'],
            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
            'end_time': a['end_time']
        })
    return render_template('auction_status.html', auctions=auctions_context)

@app.route('/refresh_status', methods=['POST'])
def refresh_status():
    return redirect(url_for('auction_status'))


if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True, port=5000)


  [Agent Output] === backend_feedback.txt ===
Backend Testing Feedback for Online Auction System

1. Auction Data File Handling:
- The backend expects the data files such as "data/auctions.txt" to be present for reading auction data.
- The current implementation raises errors if these files are missing; the code needs robust file existence checks and fallback mechanisms.
- Please ensure the data directory and required files exist or include code to create them if missing.

2. Auction Load & Save Functions:
- Functions load_auctions() and save_auctions() read and write auction data respectively in a pipe-delimited format.
- These functions handle basic parsing and formatting but lack detailed data validation.
- Error handling is only generic; consider more precise error messages and recovery.

3. Routes:
- The '/' dashboard route loads active auctions sorted by current bid and renders 'dashboard.html' with featured auctions.
- Other routes are implied but not fully implemented or tested; further development is needed.

4. Input Validations & Error Handling:
- Bid placements and other user inputs need validation to prevent errors and ensure data integrity.
- The code snippets show attempts at redirecting on invalid inputs but lack detailed user feedback.

5. Missing Features and Suggestions:
- Add explicit unit tests for each backend function and route.
- Implement all routes completely according to the intended functionality including catalog, auction details, bid placing, categories, winners, trending, and auction status.
- Validate all file operations and handle missing or corrupted data files gracefully.
- Add logging for backend operations for easier debugging and monitoring.
- Improve security by sanitizing user inputs and implementing authentication where necessary.

6. Testing Environment Setup:
- To successfully run and test the backend, create the "data" directory and populate it with sample data files or extend the backend to auto-generate sample data if files are missing.

Summary:
The backend contains core logic for auction data management and basic routing but requires completing the missing functionality, strengthening error handling, and comprehensive testing. These steps will improve reliability, usability, and maintainability of the Online Auction platform backend.

Please implement these improvements and re-run tests for further assessment.

Test app.py backend routes and business logic; write backend_test_report.txt and backend_feedback.txt
=== app.py ===
from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request
import os
from datetime import datetime

app = Flask(__name__)
app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'dev-secret-key'

# Filepaths
AUCTIONS_FILE = "data/auctions.txt"
CATEGORIES_FILE = "data/categories.txt"
BIDS_FILE = "data/bids.txt"
WINNERS_FILE = "data/winners.txt"
BID_HISTORY_FILE = "data/bid_history.txt"
ITEMS_FILE = "data/items.txt"
TRENDING_FILE = "data/trending.txt"

# Helper functions to load and save data

def load_auctions():
    auctions = []
    if os.path.exists(AUCTIONS_FILE):
        with open(AUCTIONS_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 9:
                    try:
                        auctions.append({
                            'auction_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'item_name': parts[1],
                            'description': parts[2],
                            'category': parts[3],
                            'starting_bid': float(parts[4]),
                            'current_bid': float(parts[5]),
                            'end_time': parts[6],
                            'status': parts[7],
                            'image_url': parts[8]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return auctions

def save_auctions(auctions):
    lines = []
    for a in auctions:
        lines.append('|'.join([
            str(a['auction_id']),
            a['item_name'],
            a['description'],
            a['category'],
            f"{a['starting_bid']:.2f}",
            f"{a['current_bid']:.2f}",
            a['end_time'],
            a['status'],
            a['image_url']
        ]))
    with open(AUCTIONS_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('\n'.join(lines))


def load_categories():
    categories = []
    if os.path.exists(CATEGORIES_FILE):
        with open(CATEGORIES_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 4:
                    try:
                        categories.append({
                            'category_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'category_name': parts[1],
                            'description': parts[2],
                            'item_count': int(parts[3])
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return categories

def load_bids():
    bids = []
    if os.path.exists(BIDS_FILE):
        with open(BIDS_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 5:
                    try:
                        bids.append({
                            'bid_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'auction_id': int(parts[1]),
                            'bidder_name': parts[2],
                            'bid_amount': float(parts[3]),
                            'bid_timestamp': parts[4]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return bids

def save_bids(bids):
    lines = []
    for b in bids:
        lines.append('|'.join([
            str(b['bid_id']),
            str(b['auction_id']),
            b['bidder_name'],
            f"{b['bid_amount']:.2f}",
            b['bid_timestamp']
        ]))
    with open(BIDS_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('\n'.join(lines))

def load_winners():
    winners = []
    if os.path.exists(WINNERS_FILE):
        with open(WINNERS_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 6:
                    try:
                        winners.append({
                            'winner_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'auction_id': int(parts[1]),
                            'item_name': parts[2],
                            'winner_name': parts[3],
                            'winning_bid': float(parts[4]),
                            'win_date': parts[5]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return winners

def load_bid_history():
    history = []
    if os.path.exists(BID_HISTORY_FILE):
        with open(BID_HISTORY_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 6:
                    try:
                        history.append({
                            'history_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'auction_id': int(parts[1]),
                            'auction_name': parts[2],
                            'bidder_name': parts[3],
                            'bid_amount': float(parts[4]),
                            'bid_timestamp': parts[5]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return history

def save_bid_history(history):
    lines = []
    for h in history:
        lines.append('|'.join([
            str(h['history_id']),
            str(h['auction_id']),
            h['auction_name'],
            h['bidder_name'],
            f"{h['bid_amount']:.2f}",
            h['bid_timestamp']
        ]))
    with open(BID_HISTORY_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('\n'.join(lines))

def load_trending():
    trending = []
    if os.path.exists(TRENDING_FILE):
        with open(TRENDING_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 6:
                    try:
                        trending.append({
                            'auction_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'item_name': parts[1],
                            'bid_count': int(parts[2]),
                            'current_bid': float(parts[3]),
                            'trending_rank': int(parts[4]),
                            'time_period': parts[5]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return trending

# Routes

@app.route('/')
def root_redirect():
    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))

@app.route('/dashboard')
def dashboard():
    auctions = load_auctions()
    categories = load_categories()
    trending = load_trending()

    featured_auctions = []
    active_auctions = [a for a in auctions if a['status'] == 'Active']
    sorted_active = sorted(active_auctions, key=lambda a: (-a['current_bid'], a['end_time']))
    for a in sorted_active[:3]:
        featured_auctions.append({
            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
            'item_name': a['item_name'],
            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
            'end_time': a['end_time']
        })

    trending_auctions = []
    sorted_trending = sorted(trending, key=lambda t: t['trending_rank'])
    for t in sorted_trending[:3]:
        trending_auctions.append({
            'auction_id': t['auction_id'],
            'item_name': t['item_name'],
            'current_bid': t['current_bid'],
            'bid_count': t['bid_count']
        })

    categories_context = []
    for c in categories:
        categories_context.append({
            'category_id': c['category_id'],
            'category_name': c['category_name'],
            'item_count': c['item_count']
        })

    return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_auctions=featured_auctions, trending_auctions=trending_auctions, categories=categories_context)

@app.route('/catalog')
def auction_catalog():
    auctions = load_auctions()
    categories = load_categories()

    auctions_context = []
    for a in auctions:
        auctions_context.append({
            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
            'item_name': a['item_name'],
            'description': a['description'],
            'category': a['category'],
            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
            'end_time': a['end_time'],
            'image_url': a['image_url']
        })

    categories_context = []
    for c in categories:
        categories_context.append({
            'category_id': c['category_id'],
            'category_name': c['category_name']
        })

    return render_template('catalog.html', auctions=auctions_context, categories=categories_context)

@app.route('/auction/<int:auction_id>')
def auction_details(auction_id):
    auctions = load_auctions()
    auction = next((a for a in auctions if a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)
    if auction is None:
        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))

    bid_history_all = load_bid_history()
    bid_history = [
        {'bidder_name': b['bidder_name'], 'bid_amount': b['bid_amount'], 'bid_timestamp': b['bid_timestamp']}
        for b in bid_history_all if b['auction_id'] == auction_id
    ]

    return render_template('auction_details.html', auction=auction, bid_history=bid_history)

@app.route('/place_bid/<int:auction_id>')
def place_bid(auction_id):
    auctions = load_auctions()
    auction = next((a for a in auctions if a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)
    if auction is None:
        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))

    minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01

    auction_context = {
        'auction_id': auction['auction_id'],
        'item_name': auction['item_name'],
        'current_bid': auction['current_bid'],
        'minimum_bid': round(minimum_bid, 2)
    }
    return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction_context)

@app.route('/submit_bid/<int:auction_id>', methods=['POST'])
def submit_bid(auction_id):
    bidder_name = request.form.get('bidder_name', '').strip()
    bid_amount_str = request.form.get('bid_amount', '').strip()

    if not bidder_name or not bid_amount_str:
        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))
    try:
        bid_amount = float(bid_amount_str)
    except ValueError:
        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))

    auctions = load_auctions()
    auction = next((a for a in auctions if a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)
    if auction is None:
        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))

    minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01
    if bid_amount < minimum_bid:
        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))

    now_str = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')

    bids = load_bids()
    new_bid_id = max((b['bid_id'] for b in bids), default=0) + 1
    new_bid = {
        'bid_id': new_bid_id,
        'auction_id': auction_id,
        'bidder_name': bidder_name,
        'bid_amount': bid_amount,
        'bid_timestamp': now_str
    }
    bids.append(new_bid)
    save_bids(bids)

    # Update auction current_bid
    for a in auctions:
        if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:
            a['current_bid'] = bid_amount
            break
    save_auctions(auctions)

    # Append to bid history
    bid_history = load_bid_history()
    new_history_id = max((h['history_id'] for h in bid_history), default=0) + 1
    new_history = {
        'history_id': new_history_id,
        'auction_id': auction_id,
        'auction_name': auction['item_name'],
        'bidder_name': bidder_name,
        'bid_amount': bid_amount,
        'bid_timestamp': now_str
    }
    bid_history.append(new_history)
    save_bid_history(bid_history)

    return redirect(url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction_id))

@app.route('/bid_history')
def bid_history():
    bid_history_raw = load_bid_history()
    bids = [
        {
            'bid_id': h['history_id'],
            'auction_name': h['auction_name'],
            'bidder_name': h['bidder_name'],
            'bid_amount': h['bid_amount'],
            'bid_timestamp': h['bid_timestamp']
        }
        for h in bid_history_raw
    ]
    auctions_raw = load_auctions()
    auctions = [{'auction_id': a['auction_id'], 'item_name': a['item_name']} for a in auctions_raw]
    return render_template('bid_history.html', bids=bids, auctions=auctions)

@app.route('/categories')
def categories():
    categories_raw = load_categories()
    categories_context = []
    for c in categories_raw:
        categories_context.append({
            'category_id': c['category_id'],
            'category_name': c['category_name'],
            'description': c['description'],
            'item_count': c['item_count']
        })
    return render_template('categories.html', categories=categories_context)

@app.route('/category/<int:category_id>')
def category_items(category_id):
    categories = load_categories()
    category_name = None
    for c in categories:
        if c['category_id'] == category_id:
            category_name = c['category_name']
            break
    if category_name is None:
        return redirect(url_for('categories'))

    auctions = load_auctions()
    filtered_auctions = []
    for a in auctions:
        if a['category'] == category_name:
            filtered_auctions.append({
                'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
                'item_name': a['item_name'],
                'description': a['description'],
                'category': a['category'],
                'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
                'end_time': a['end_time'],
                'image_url': a['image_url']
            })

    return render_template('catalog.html', auctions=filtered_auctions, category_name=category_name)

@app.route('/winners')
def winners():
    winners_raw = load_winners()
    winners_context = []
    for w in winners_raw:
        winners_context.append({
            'auction_id': w['auction_id'],
            'item_name': w['item_name'],
            'winner_name': w['winner_name'],
            'winning_bid': w['winning_bid'],
            'win_date': w['win_date']
        })
    return render_template('winners.html', winners=winners_context)

@app.route('/trending')
def trending_auctions():
    trending_data = load_trending()
    sorted_trending = sorted(trending_data, key=lambda t: t['trending_rank'])
    trending_context = []
    for t in sorted_trending:
        trending_context.append({
            'auction_id': t['auction_id'],
            'item_name': t['item_name'],
            'bid_count': t['bid_count'],
            'current_bid': t['current_bid'],
            'trending_rank': t['trending_rank']
        })
    return render_template('trending.html', trending_auctions=trending_context)

@app.route('/auction_status')
def auction_status():
    auctions = load_auctions()
    auctions_context = []
    for a in auctions:
        auctions_context.append({
            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
            'item_name': a['item_name'],
            'status': a['status'],
            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
            'end_time': a['end_time']
        })
    return render_template('auction_status.html', auctions=auctions_context)

def refresh_status():
    return redirect(url_for('auction_status'))

from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request
import os
from datetime import datetime

app = Flask(__name__)
app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'dev-secret-key'

# Filepaths
AUCTIONS_FILE = "data/auctions.txt"
CATEGORIES_FILE = "data/categories.txt"
BIDS_FILE = "data/bids.txt"
WINNERS_FILE = "data/winners.txt"
BID_HISTORY_FILE = "data/bid_history.txt"
ITEMS_FILE = "data/items.txt"
TRENDING_FILE = "data/trending.txt"

# Helper functions to load and save data

def load_auctions():
    auctions = []
    if os.path.exists(AUCTIONS_FILE):
        with open(AUCTIONS_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 9:
                    try:
                        auctions.append({
                            'auction_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'item_name': parts[1],
                            'description': parts[2],
                            'category': parts[3],
                            'starting_bid': float(parts[4]),
                            'current_bid': float(parts[5]),
                            'end_time': parts[6],
                            'status': parts[7],
                            'image_url': parts[8]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return auctions

def save_auctions(auctions):
    lines = []
    for a in auctions:
        lines.append('|'.join([
            str(a['auction_id']),
            a['item_name'],
            a['description'],
            a['category'],
            f"{a['starting_bid']:.2f}",
            f"{a['current_bid']:.2f}",
            a['end_time'],
            a['status'],
            a['image_url']
        ]))
    with open(AUCTIONS_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('\n'.join(lines))


def load_categories():
    categories = []
    if os.path.exists(CATEGORIES_FILE):
        with open(CATEGORIES_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 4:
                    try:
                        categories.append({
                            'category_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'category_name': parts[1],
                            'description': parts[2],
                            'item_count': int(parts[3])
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return categories

def load_bids():
    bids = []
    if os.path.exists(BIDS_FILE):
        with open(BIDS_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 5:
                    try:
                        bids.append({
                            'bid_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'auction_id': int(parts[1]),
                            'bidder_name': parts[2],
                            'bid_amount': float(parts[3]),
                            'bid_timestamp': parts[4]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return bids

def save_bids(bids):
    lines = []
    for b in bids:
        lines.append('|'.join([
            str(b['bid_id']),
            str(b['auction_id']),
            b['bidder_name'],
            f"{b['bid_amount']:.2f}",
            b['bid_timestamp']
        ]))
    with open(BIDS_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('\n'.join(lines))

def load_winners():
    winners = []
    if os.path.exists(WINNERS_FILE):
        with open(WINNERS_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 6:
                    try:
                        winners.append({
                            'winner_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'auction_id': int(parts[1]),
                            'item_name': parts[2],
                            'winner_name': parts[3],
                            'winning_bid': float(parts[4]),
                            'win_date': parts[5]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return winners

def load_bid_history():
    history = []
    if os.path.exists(BID_HISTORY_FILE):
        with open(BID_HISTORY_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 6:
                    try:
                        history.append({
                            'history_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'auction_id': int(parts[1]),
                            'auction_name': parts[2],
                            'bidder_name': parts[3],
                            'bid_amount': float(parts[4]),
                            'bid_timestamp': parts[5]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return history

def save_bid_history(history):
    lines = []
    for h in history:
        lines.append('|'.join([
            str(h['history_id']),
            str(h['auction_id']),
            h['auction_name'],
            h['bidder_name'],
            f"{h['bid_amount']:.2f}",
            h['bid_timestamp']
        ]))
    with open(BID_HISTORY_FILE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('\n'.join(lines))

def load_trending():
    trending = []
    if os.path.exists(TRENDING_FILE):
        with open(TRENDING_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) == 6:
                    try:
                        trending.append({
                            'auction_id': int(parts[0]),
                            'item_name': parts[1],
                            'bid_count': int(parts[2]),
                            'current_bid': float(parts[3]),
                            'trending_rank': int(parts[4]),
                            'time_period': parts[5]
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        continue
    return trending

# Routes

@app.route('/')
def root_redirect():
    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))

@app.route('/dashboard')
def dashboard():
    auctions = load_auctions()
    categories = load_categories()
    trending = load_trending()

    featured_auctions = []
    active_auctions = [a for a in auctions if a['status'] == 'Active']
    sorted_active = sorted(active_auctions, key=lambda a: (-a['current_bid'], a['end_time']))
    for a in sorted_active[:3]:
        featured_auctions.append({
            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
            'item_name': a['item_name'],
            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
            'end_time': a['end_time']
        })

    trending_auctions = []
    sorted_trending = sorted(trending, key=lambda t: t['trending_rank'])
    for t in sorted_trending[:3]:
        trending_auctions.append({
            'auction_id': t['auction_id'],
            'item_name': t['item_name'],
            'current_bid': t['current_bid'],
            'bid_count': t['bid_count']
        })

    categories_context = []
    for c in categories:
        categories_context.append({
            'category_id': c['category_id'],
            'category_name': c['category_name'],
            'item_count': c['item_count']
        })

    return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_auctions=featured_auctions, trending_auctions=trending_auctions, categories=categories_context)

@app.route('/catalog')
def auction_catalog():
    auctions = load_auctions()
    categories = load_categories()

    auctions_context = []
    for a in auctions:
        auctions_context.append({
            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
            'item_name': a['item_name'],
            'description': a['description'],
            'category': a['category'],
            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
            'end_time': a['end_time'],
            'image_url': a['image_url']
        })

    categories_context = []
    for c in categories:
        categories_context.append({
            'category_id': c['category_id'],
            'category_name': c['category_name']
        })

    return render_template('catalog.html', auctions=auctions_context, categories=categories_context)

@app.route('/auction/<int:auction_id>')
def auction_details(auction_id):
    auctions = load_auctions()
    auction = next((a for a in auctions if a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)
    if auction is None:
        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))

    bid_history_all = load_bid_history()
    bid_history = [
        {'bidder_name': b['bidder_name'], 'bid_amount': b['bid_amount'], 'bid_timestamp': b['bid_timestamp']}
        for b in bid_history_all if b['auction_id'] == auction_id
    ]

    return render_template('auction_details.html', auction=auction, bid_history=bid_history)

@app.route('/place_bid/<int:auction_id>')
def place_bid(auction_id):
    auctions = load_auctions()
    auction = next((a for a in auctions if a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)
    if auction is None:
        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))

    minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01

    auction_context = {
        'auction_id': auction['auction_id'],
        'item_name': auction['item_name'],
        'current_bid': auction['current_bid'],
        'minimum_bid': round(minimum_bid, 2)
    }
    return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction_context)

@app.route('/submit_bid/<int:auction_id>', methods=['POST'])
def submit_bid(auction_id):
    bidder_name = request.form.get('bidder_name', '').strip()
    bid_amount_str = request.form.get('bid_amount', '').strip()

    if not bidder_name or not bid_amount_str:
        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))
    try:
        bid_amount = float(bid_amount_str)
    except ValueError:
        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))

    auctions = load_auctions()
    auction = next((a for a in auctions if a['auction_id'] == auction_id), None)
    if auction is None:
        return redirect(url_for('auction_catalog'))

    minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01
    if bid_amount < minimum_bid:
        return redirect(url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction_id))

    now_str = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')

    bids = load_bids()
    new_bid_id = max((b['bid_id'] for b in bids), default=0) + 1
    new_bid = {
        'bid_id': new_bid_id,
        'auction_id': auction_id,
        'bidder_name': bidder_name,
        'bid_amount': bid_amount,
        'bid_timestamp': now_str
    }
    bids.append(new_bid)
    save_bids(bids)

    # Update auction current_bid
    for a in auctions:
        if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:
            a['current_bid'] = bid_amount
            break
    save_auctions(auctions)

    # Append to bid history
    bid_history = load_bid_history()
    new_history_id = max((h['history_id'] for h in bid_history), default=0) + 1
    new_history = {
        'history_id': new_history_id,
        'auction_id': auction_id,
        'auction_name': auction['item_name'],
        'bidder_name': bidder_name,
        'bid_amount': bid_amount,
        'bid_timestamp': now_str
    }
    bid_history.append(new_history)
    save_bid_history(bid_history)

    return redirect(url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction_id))

@app.route('/bid_history')
def bid_history():
    bid_history_raw = load_bid_history()
    bids = [
        {
            'bid_id': h['history_id'],
            'auction_name': h['auction_name'],
            'bidder_name': h['bidder_name'],
            'bid_amount': h['bid_amount'],
            'bid_timestamp': h['bid_timestamp']
        }
        for h in bid_history_raw
    ]
    auctions_raw = load_auctions()
    auctions = [{'auction_id': a['auction_id'], 'item_name': a['item_name']} for a in auctions_raw]
    return render_template('bid_history.html', bids=bids, auctions=auctions)

@app.route('/categories')
def categories():
    categories_raw = load_categories()
    categories_context = []
    for c in categories_raw:
        categories_context.append({
            'category_id': c['category_id'],
            'category_name': c['category_name'],
            'description': c['description'],
            'item_count': c['item_count']
        })
    return render_template('categories.html', categories=categories_context)

@app.route('/category/<int:category_id>')
def category_items(category_id):
    categories = load_categories()
    category_name = None
    for c in categories:
        if c['category_id'] == category_id:
            category_name = c['category_name']
            break
    if category_name is None:
        return redirect(url_for('categories'))

    auctions = load_auctions()
    filtered_auctions = []
    for a in auctions:
        if a['category'] == category_name:
            filtered_auctions.append({
                'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
                'item_name': a['item_name'],
                'description': a['description'],
                'category': a['category'],
                'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
                'end_time': a['end_time'],
                'image_url': a['image_url']
            })

    return render_template('catalog.html', auctions=filtered_auctions, category_name=category_name)

@app.route('/winners')
def winners():
    winners_raw = load_winners()
    winners_context = []
    for w in winners_raw:
        winners_context.append({
            'auction_id': w['auction_id'],
            'item_name': w['item_name'],
            'winner_name': w['winner_name'],
            'winning_bid': w['winning_bid'],
            'win_date': w['win_date']
        })
    return render_template('winners.html', winners=winners_context)

@app.route('/trending')
def trending_auctions():
    trending_data = load_trending()
    sorted_trending = sorted(trending_data, key=lambda t: t['trending_rank'])
    trending_context = []
    for t in sorted_trending:
        trending_context.append({
            'auction_id': t['auction_id'],
            'item_name': t['item_name'],
            'bid_count': t['bid_count'],
            'current_bid': t['current_bid'],
            'trending_rank': t['trending_rank']
        })
    return render_template('trending.html', trending_auctions=trending_context)

@app.route('/auction_status')
def auction_status():
    auctions = load_auctions()
    auctions_context = []
    for a in auctions:
        auctions_context.append({
            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
            'item_name': a['item_name'],
            'status': a['status'],
            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
            'end_time': a['end_time']
        })
    return render_template('auction_status.html', auctions=auctions_context)

@app.route('/refresh_status', methods=['POST'])
def refresh_status():
    return redirect(url_for('auction_status'))


if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True, port=5000)
